name: UserGuiding
description: UserGuiding — affordable no-code user onboarding platform with product tours, checklists, hotspots, and resource centers.

seo.title: UserGuiding — Push / In-app Messaging SDK
seo.meta_description: UserGuiding: UserGuiding — affordable no-code user onboarding platform with product tours, checklists, hotspots, and resource centers.

when_to_use: No-code product tour builder for SaaS onboarding flows
Hotspot and checklist-based feature adoption campaigns
Resource center and self-serve help widget for SaaS apps

pros: Most affordable tier in the onboarding category
Full feature set: tours, checklists, hotspots, RC
Quick install with minimal eng involvement
review.verdict: Budget champion for onboarding widgets; pay more for Userflow/Chameleon if polish and targeting matter.
review.best_for: Budget-conscious SaaS needing basic tours and checklists fast
review.not_for: Enterprise apps or teams demanding fine targeting and QA
